title: USD/JPY
text: BoJ intervention risk rising as USD/JPY approaches the 160.00 level; watch for verbal warnings.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD long positioning at 71.1% — watch for potential squeeze as retail sentiment is extremely short at 89%.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX

title: VIX

title: Fed-ECB Rate Differential
text: Fed 3.75% (ON HOLD) vs ECB 2.00% (ON HOLD) — 175bp spread continues to weigh on EUR/USD; rate divergence favours USD.
